tasks.label: Install Jest
tasks.command: npx expo install jest-expo jest @types/jest && echo DONE

tasks.label: Copy sql-wasm.wasm to public/
tasks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('node_modules','sql.js','dist','sql-wasm.wasm');const dst=path.join('public','sql-wasm.wasm');fs.mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Copied sql-wasm.wasm to public/')"
